headline: Alibaba Group Holding Limited (BABA) Refutes NVIDIA AI Chips Smuggling Claims
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE:BABA) is one of the best AI stocks to buy for 2026, according to billionaire David Tepper. On May 8, Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE:BABA) was on the defensive, refuting claims that it was one of the beneficiaries of billions of dollars’ worth of Super Micro computer servers containing Nvidia chips […]

headline: 'Tip Of The Iceberg': Culper Research Targets Nvidia's Alleged China Problem
summary: Nvidia is the subject of a critical short report released Wednesday by Culper Research, which alleges the semiconductor giant faces a significant and undisclosed "China problem."

headline: As Jensen Huang Joins Trump's China Summit, Bombshell Report Claims Nvidia's China Revenue Never Went To Zero
summary: As Jensen Huang joins Trump's Beijing summit, Culper Research alleges Nvidia's China business never went to zero, citing Alibaba financing and diversion.
